name: Cat Litter Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef, turkey or pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the Bisquick and shredded cheddar cheese until well combined.
3. Add the ground beef, turkey, or pork, as well as the sausage, to the mixture. Ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish, spreading it out evenly.
5. Place the casserole in the preheated oven and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
